name: io.github.serpdive/serpdive-mcp
title: SERPdive Web Search
description: Real-time web search returning answer-ready page content for LLMs and agents. A Tavily alternative: same speed, 20.2% fewer tokens on a public benchmark. Hosted or via npx.
